item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 86 pts (0.462) Tampa Bay Lightning – 82 pts (0.448) Buffalo Sabres – 82 pts (0.434) Montreal Canadiens – 78 pts (0.419) Detroit Red Wings – 77 pts (0.407) Pittsburgh Penguins – 76 pts (0.409) Boston Bruins – 75 pts (0.403) New York Islanders – 75 pts (0.397) Columbus Blue Jackets – 73 pts (0.392) Ottawa Senators – 69 pts (0.377) Philadelphia Flyers – 69 pts (0.371) Washington Capitals – 69 pts (0.359) New Jersey Devils – 66 pts (0.349) Florida Panthers – 65 pts (0.344) Toronto Maple Leafs – 65 pts (0.339) New York Rangers – 56 pts (0.301) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
item.description: Western Conference Standings () --------------------- Colorado Avalanche – 93 pts (0.508) Dallas Stars – 86 pts (0.462) Minnesota Wild – 84 pts (0.444) Anaheim Ducks – 73 pts (0.392) Utah Mammoth – 72 pts (0.381) Vegas Golden Knights – 72 pts (0.381) Edmonton Oilers – 68 pts (0.36) Seattle Kraken – 67 pts (0.366) San Jose Sharks – 65 pts (0.361) Los Angeles Kings – 64 pts (0.344) Nashville Predators – 64 pts (0.339) Winnipeg Jets – 62 pts (0.333) St. Louis Blues – 57 pts (0.306) Chicago Blackhawks – 56 pts (0.301) Calgary Flames – 55 pts (0.301) Vancouver Canucks – 46 pts (0.243) ---------------------
